name: W-10 gate prints the offending resource and the holding session_id on rejection per the architecture
command: mkdir -p sessions && printf '%s' '{"session_id":"cl-100","phases":["E"],"branch":"a"}' > sessions/cl-100.json && printf '%s' '{"session_id":"cl-101","phases":["E"],"branch":"b"}' > cand.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/concurrent-cl-gate.sh" --sessions-dir sessions --candidate cand.json --allow-concurrent 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'offending_resource=phase=E' err.txt && grep -q 'holding_session=cl-100' err.txt && echo reported 1>&2
